description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly gray and white color palette. The structure includes a spacious outdoor area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a patio shaded by a roof extension supported by columns. The upper level has a terrace with two trees planted in built-in planters, adding greenery to the otherwise sleek and geometric architecture. Large windows and sliding glass doors are arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light and visual connection between the interior and exterior spaces. The house appears to have multiple sections, including a main living area, a garage, and a covered outdoor lounge. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, emphasizing open spaces, functional outdoor living, and integration with the environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a pool, and a shaded patio, featuring minimalist lines and a gray-white color scheme.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with a prominent garage, the upper terrace with trees, and the pool area extending to the right.
description_view_1: The front view showcases the main entry, shaded patio, pool, and outdoor lounge area, with the terrace and trees above.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the long, flat roof, the terrace with trees, and the pool area to the left.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the extensive window bands, the garage, and the terrace with trees, with less emphasis on the pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: horizontal bands of large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is recessed under a flat overhang, with wide steps leading to a shaded patio and large glass doors, emphasizing openness and minimalism.
